Precondition: Both end effectors empty; cylinder_1 and cylinder_2 accessible on box; glasses undisturbed.
Postcondition: Right end effector grasping cylinder_2; left end effector grasping cylinder_1; glasses undisturbed.

Precondition: Right end effector grasping cylinder_2; left end effector grasping cylinder_1; table top available; glasses undisturbed.
Postcondition: cylinder_1 and cylinder_2 placed on table; both end effectors empty; box top unblocked; glasses undisturbed.

Precondition: Both end effectors empty; box sides accessible; box top unblocked; glasses undisturbed.
Postcondition: Box grasped with both end effectors; glasses undisturbed.
